info.title: API v2 Documentation
info.description:
Complete API v2 documentation.

## Authentication

All requests require an API token. Include it in the `Authorization` header:

```
Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_TOKEN
```

Alternatively, you can use the `X-API-Key` header:

```
X-API-Key: YOUR_API_TOKEN
```

## Base URL

```
https://yourdomain.com/api/v2
```

## Rate Limiting

API requests are rate-limited per token. Check response headers:
- `X-RateLimit-Limit`: Total requests allowed
- `X-RateLimit-Remaining`: Remaining requests
- `X-RateLimit-Reset`: Unix timestamp when limit resets

## Response Format

All responses follow a consistent JSON structure:

**Success Response:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": { ... },
  "meta": {
    "request_id": "uuid",
    "timestamp": "2024-02-08T14:30:25Z"
  }
}
```

**Error Response:**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "error": {
    "code": "ERROR_CODE",
    "message": "Error description",
    "details": { ... }
  },
  "meta": {
    "request_id": "uuid",
    "timestamp": "2024-02-08T14:30:25Z"
  }
}
```

tags.name: Contacts
tags.description: Contact management endpoints for creating, reading, updating, and deleting contacts.

tags.name: Messages
tags.description:
Send and manage WhatsApp messages through multiple channels.

**Sending Endpoints (Scope: `messages:send`):**
- `POST /messages/text` — Send plain text messages (within 24-hour window)
- `POST /messages/template` — Send pre-approved template messages (any time)
- `POST /messages/media` — Send media files (image, video, document, audio)
- `POST /messages/interactive` — Send interactive messages (buttons or lists)

**Reading Endpoints (Scope: `messages:read`):**
- `GET /messages` — List message history (filterable, sortable, searchable)
- `GET /messages/{id}` — Get detailed message information

**Common Behavior:**
- All send endpoints auto-create contacts if phone number is new
- Merge fields (e.g., `@{contact_first_name}`) are supported in text and template messages
- WhatsApp 24-hour customer service window applies to text and media messages
- Template messages can be sent at any time regardless of the window

tags.name: Authentication (OTP/Verification)
tags.description:
Complete OTP-as-a-Service for WhatsApp authentication.

Send, verify, resend, and check status of OTP codes delivered via WhatsApp AUTHENTICATION category templates. Includes auto-contact creation, rate limiting, attempt tracking, and expiry management.

**Authentication Flow:**
1. `GET /auth/templates` — Discover available authentication templates
2. `POST /auth/send-otp` — Send OTP code via WhatsApp template
3. `POST /auth/status` — (Optional) Check OTP status / expiry timer
4. `POST /auth/verify` — Verify the OTP code
5. `POST /auth/resend` — Resend if needed (generates new code)

**Required Scopes:** `messages:send` (send, verify, resend, status), `templates:read` (list templates)

**Rate Limits:**
- Verify: 10 attempts per minute per phone
- Resend: 3 attempts per 5 minutes per phone
- OTP: 5 verification attempts per code (configurable)

tags.name: Groups
tags.description: Manage contact groups for organizing and targeting contacts.

tags.name: Templates
tags.description:
Manage WhatsApp message templates synced from your WhatsApp Business Account.

Templates are created and managed through Meta Business Manager and synced to your account via the API. This section provides read-only access to templates and a sync endpoint to refresh the local template database.

**Available Endpoints:**
- `GET /templates` — List all templates (filterable, sortable, searchable)
- `GET /templates/{id}` — Get a specific template by WhatsApp template ID
- `POST /templates/sync` — Sync templates from WhatsApp Business API

**Required Scopes:** `templates:read`, `templates:sync`

get.description:
Retrieve a paginated list of contacts with advanced filtering, sorting, searching, field selection, and relationship inclusion.

## Authentication

**Required Scope:** `contacts:read`

## Query Parameters

### Pagination

| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|---------|-------------|
| `page` | integer | 1 | Page number |
| `per_page` | integer | 15 | Items per page (max: 100) |

### Sorting

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| `sort` | string | Comma-separated sort fields. Prefix with `-` for descending order |

**Allowed sort fields:** `id`, `firstname`, `lastname`, `created_at`, `updated_at`

### Searching

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| `search` | string | Search across firstname, lastname, email, phone, company (partial match) |
| `q` | string | Alias for `search` |

### Filtering

Use `filter[field]` for exact match or `filter[field][operator]` for complex filters.

**Allowed filter fields:** `filter[type]`, `filter[status_id]`, `filter[source_id]`, `filter[assigned_id]`, `filter[created_at]`, `filter[group_id]`

**Complex filter operators:** `gte` (>=), `lte` (<=), `gt` (>), `lt` (<), `ne` (!=), `like`, `in`, `not_in`, `between`, `null`

### Relationships

`include` — comma-separated. Allowed: `groups`, `source`, `status`

### Field Selection

`fields` — comma-separated. Critical fields always included: id, tenant_id, created_at, updated_at, type, status_id, source_id, email, phone, description, city, state, zip, address, country_id, assigned_id, group_id, is_opted_out, firstname, lastname, company

## Response Fields

id, firstname, lastname, company, type (lead/customer/guest), email, phone, status_id, source_id, description, city, state, zip, address, country_id, assigned_id, group_id (array), is_opted_out, created_at, updated_at, groups (when included), source (when included), status (when included)

## Pagination Meta

meta.pagination: total, count, per_page, current_page, total_pages, has_more

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort by field. Allowed: id, firstname, lastname, created_at, updated_at. Prefix with - for descending. Comma-separated for multiple sorts

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search across firstname, lastname, email, phone, company (partial match)

parameters.name: filter[type]
parameters.description: Filter by contact type. Allowed values: lead, customer, guest

parameters.name: filter[assigned_id]
parameters.description: Filter by assigned user ID (exact match)

parameters.name: filter[group_id]
parameters.description: Filter by group ID (JSON contains match on group_id array)

parameters.name: filter[created_at][gte]
parameters.description: Filter created_at >= value. Operators: gte, lte, gt, lt, ne, like, in, not_in, between, null

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Include relationships. Allowed: groups, source, status (comma-separated)

post.description:
Create a new contact. **Required Scope:** `contacts:write`

## Request Body

| Field | Type | Required | Validation |
|---|---|---|---|
| firstname | string | Yes | max:255 |
| lastname | string | Yes | max:255 |
| phone | string | Yes | max:20, unique per tenant |
| type | string | Yes | lead, customer, guest |
| source_id | integer | Yes | must exist in tenant sources |
| status_id | integer | Yes | must exist in tenant statuses |
| email | string | No | email, max:191, unique per tenant |
| company | string | No | max:255 |
| description | string | No | — |
| city, state | string | No | max:255 |
| zip | string | No | max:20 |
| address | string | No | max:500 |
| country_id | integer | No | — |
| assigned_id | integer | No | — |
| groups | array | No | array of integers |

## Errors
422 VALIDATION_ERROR, 403 FEATURE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED (contact limit reached), 500 INTERNAL_ERROR

get.description: Retrieve a single contact by ID. **Required Scope:** `contacts:read`. Query param `include` (groups, source, status). Errors: 404 NOT_FOUND, 500 INTERNAL_ERROR

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Include relationships. Allowed: groups, source, status (comma-separated)

patch.description: Partial update. **Required Scope:** `contacts:write`. All fields optional, same validation as create. `groups` if provided replaces existing groups entirely. Errors: 404 NOT_FOUND, 422 VALIDATION_ERROR, 500 INTERNAL_ERROR

delete.description: Permanently delete a contact by ID. **Required Scope:** `contacts:delete`. Errors: 404 NOT_FOUND, 500 INTERNAL_ERROR. NOT included in v1 MCP tool scope (irreversible).

post.description: Create multiple contacts transactionally. **Required Scope:** `contacts:write`. Body: `contacts` (array, same fields as single create), `options.continue_on_error` (bool, default true), `options.skip_duplicates` (bool, default false, dedupes by phone). Response includes summary.total/created/skipped/failed plus created/skipped/errors arrays.

delete.description: Delete multiple contacts by ID transactionally. **Required Scope:** `contacts:delete`. Body: `ids` array. IDs not found/not belonging to tenant are counted as failed, not errored. NOT included in v1 MCP tool scope (irreversible bulk action).

post.description:
Send plain text via WhatsApp Cloud API. Auto-creates contact if phone is new (requires default lead status/source/assignee configured). Subject to 24h customer service window. **Required Scope:** `messages:send`

## Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Validation |
|---|---|---|---|
| phone | string | Yes | min:10, max:20, digits/+/-/spaces/() |
| message | string | Yes | max:4096, supports merge fields |
| contact_id | integer | No | valid integer |

## Merge fields
@{contact_first_name}, @{contact_last_name}, @{contact_email}, @{contact_phone}

## Response fields
message_id, contact_id, phone, message, status, sent_at, chat_id, chat_message_id

## Errors (common to all send endpoints)
401 UNAUTHORIZED, 403 INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE, 403 FEATURE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED, 403 CONTACT_OPTED_OUT, 404 NOT_FOUND, 422 VALIDATION_ERROR, 422 WHATSAPP_NOT_CONFIGURED, 429 RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED, 500 MESSAGE_SEND_FAILED, 500 INTERNAL_ERROR

example.message: Hello @{contact_first_name}! This is a test message.

post.description:
Send a pre-approved template, works anytime regardless of 24h window. Supports JSON or multipart form-data. **Required Scope:** `messages:send`

## Required fields
phone, template_name (must be APPROVED), language (max:10)

## Optional
contact_id, header_image_url/file (5MB), header_video_url/file (16MB), header_document_url/file (100MB) + header_document_name, header_field_1, field_1..field_10 (body params, support merge fields), button_0..button_2, auto_generate_otp, otp_field_number (default 1, must be 6)

## Response fields
message_id, contact_id, phone, template_name, language, status, sent_at, chat_id, chat_message_id

## Additional errors
403 FEATURE_NOT_AVAILABLE, 404 NOT_FOUND (template), 422 VALIDATION_ERROR (missing template params)

Send image/video/document/audio via WhatsApp. multipart/form-data. **Required Scope:** `messages:send`

## Fields
phone (min:10,max:15), media_type (image/document/video/audio), media_url OR media_file (one required), caption (max:1024, not for audio), filename (max:255), contact_id, contact.firstname/lastname/email/country/assigned_id/groups (for auto-creation)

## Size/extension limits
image: jpg/jpeg/png/webp, 5MB | document: pdf/doc/docx/xls/xlsx/ppt/pptx/txt/csv, 100MB | video: mp4/3gp, 16MB | audio: mp3/ogg/amr/aac/opus, 16MB (configurable per tenant)

## Response fields
message_id, contact_id, phone, media_type, media_url, caption, filename, status, sent_at, chat_id, chat_message_id

## Additional errors
422 INVALID_MEDIA_TYPE, 422 invalid extension/size exceeded

media_file.description: Direct file upload (required if no media_url)

post.description:
Send button or list interactive messages. **Required Scope:** `messages:send`

## Common fields
phone, type (button|list), body_text (max:1024), header_text (max:60), footer_text (max:60), contact_id

## Button type
buttons array (max 3), each {id, title (max:20)}

## List type
list_button_text (max:20), sections array (max:10), each {title, rows: [{id, title (max:24), description (max:72)}]}

## Response fields
message_id, contact_id, phone, type, status, sent_at, chat_id, chat_message_id

example.body_text: Would you like to schedule a demo?

post.description:
Send a true CTA URL button (opens URL on tap, unlike reply buttons). **Required Scope:** `messages:send`

## Fields
phone (min:10,max:15), message (max:1024), button_text (max:25), button_url (max:2048), header_text (max:60), footer_text (max:60), contact_id

## Response fields
message_id, contact_id, phone, button_text, button_url, status, sent_at, chat_id, chat_message_id

example.message: Tap below to open our pricing page.

get.description:
Paginated WhatsApp message history, ordered by most recent first. **Required Scope:** `messages:read`

## Query params
page, per_page (max 100), sort (created_at/updated_at, default -created_at), search/q (in message text), fields

## Filters
filter[type] (text/template/image/video/document/audio/interactive), filter[status] (sent/delivered/read/failed), filter[interaction_id], filter[direction] (inbound/outbound). Operators: none (exact), ne, in, not_in

## Response fields
id, interaction_id, sender_id, type, message, status, message_id, sent_at, is_read
Detailed info for one message by internal ID. Includes extra fields vs list: status_message, ref_message_id, url, staff_id. **Required Scope:** `messages:read`. Errors: 404 NOT_FOUND

post.description:
Send WhatsApp AUTHENTICATION template OTP. Handles contact auto-creation, stores OTP for later verify. **Required Scope:** `messages:send`

## Request Body
phone (Yes, min:10,max:20), template_name (Yes, must be APPROVED AUTHENTICATION template), code (No, digits:6, auto-generated server-side if omitted), language (No, default en), expiry_minutes (No, min:1,max:60, default 10), contact_id (No), purpose (No, default 'authentication'), additional_params (No, array)

## Response fields
message_id, contact_id, phone, template_name, language, code_sent (true), code_auto_generated, code (only if auto_generated=true), expiry_minutes, expires_at, status, sent_at

## Errors
401 UNAUTHORIZED, 403 INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE, 403 FEATURE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED, 403 CONTACT_OPTED_OUT, 403 FEATURE_NOT_AVAILABLE, 404 RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND (template), 404 NOT_FOUND (contact), 422 VALIDATION_ERROR, 422 WHATSAPP_NOT_CONFIGURED, 429 RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED, 500 MESSAGE_SEND_FAILED, 500 INTERNAL_ERROR

get.description:
Approved AUTHENTICATION-category templates only. **Required Scope:** `templates:read`

## Query params
page, per_page, sort (template_name/created_at/language), search/q, filter[language], filter[template_name]

## Response fields
id, template_name, language, body_text, body_params_count, header_format, header_text, footer_text, status (always APPROVED), created_at

post.description:
Verify code sent via /auth/send-otp. **Required Scope:** `messages:send`

## Request Body
phone (Yes), code (Yes), purpose (No, default 'authentication', must match)

## Rate limit
10 attempts/min per phone per tenant, clears on success

## Flow
clean phone -> rate check -> lookup active OTP -> max attempts check (default 5) -> expiry check -> compare code -> on success mark verified + clear limiter

## Success response
phone, purpose, verified_at

## Error scenarios
OTP_NOT_FOUND, MAX_ATTEMPTS_EXCEEDED, OTP_EXPIRED, INVALID_CODE (returns attempts_remaining)

Generates new 6-digit code, deletes previous OTP, delegates to send-otp logic. **Required Scope:** `messages:send`

## Request Body
phone (Yes), template_name (Yes), language (No, default en), expiry_minutes (No, default 10), purpose (No, default authentication)

## Rate limit
3 resend attempts / 5 min per phone per tenant (stricter than verify)

Response format same as /auth/send-otp

Non-destructive check of active OTP — doesn't consume attempts. **Required Scope:** `messages:send`

## Request Body
phone (Yes), purpose (No, default authentication)

## Response (active OTP)
has_active_otp, expires_at, expires_in_seconds, is_expired, verification_attempts, max_attempts, attempts_remaining, created_at

## Response (no active OTP)
has_active_otp: false, message: 'No active OTP found'

get.description: Paginated group list with filter/sort/search. **Required Scope:** `groups:read`. Sort fields: name, created_at, updated_at. Filter: filter[created_at] with operators gte/lte/gt/lt/ne/like/in/not_in/between/null. Response includes meta.pagination.

post.description: **Required Scope:** `groups:write`. Body: name (Yes, max:255, unique per tenant). Response: id, name, created_at, updated_at. Errors: 422 VALIDATION_ERROR

patch.description: **Required Scope:** `groups:write`. Body: name (Yes, max:255, unique excl current). Errors: 404 NOT_FOUND, 422 VALIDATION_ERROR

delete.description: **Required Scope:** `groups:delete`. Errors: 404 NOT_FOUND. NOT included in v1 MCP tool scope.

post.description: **Required Scope:** `groups:write`. Body: contact_ids (Yes, min:1, array of integers, each must exist). Already-in-group contacts silently skipped. All contacts must belong to same tenant. Response: group_id, contacts_added. Errors: 404 NOT_FOUND, 422 VALIDATION_ERROR

delete.description: **Required Scope:** `groups:write`. Body: contact_ids (Yes, min:1). Not-in-group contacts silently skipped. Response: group_id, contacts_removed. NOT included in v1 MCP tool scope (destructive-adjacent).

get.description:
**Required Scope:** `templates:read`

## Query params
page, per_page, sort (template_name/created_at/updated_at), search/q (template_name, category), fields

## Filters
status (APPROVED/PENDING/REJECTED), category (MARKETING/UTILITY/AUTHENTICATION), language. Operators: none, like, ne, in, not_in, null

## Response fields
id, template_id, template_name, name (alias), language, category, status, header_data_format, header_data_text, header_params_count, header_file_url, header_variable_value, body_data, body_params_count, body_variable_value, footer_data, footer_params_count, buttons_data, message_send_ttl_seconds, add_security_recommendation, code_expiration_minutes, otp_button_config, components, created_at, updated_at
**Required Scope:** `templates:read`. Path param id = WhatsApp template_id field (not internal id). Same response fields as list. Errors: 404 NOT_FOUND

post.description: **Required Scope:** `templates:sync`. Fetches all templates from connected WhatsApp Business Account, updates local DB. Requires wm_business_account_id and wm_access_token configured in account WhatsApp settings, else 422 WHATSAPP_NOT_CONFIGURED. Response: synced_count, templates (array). NOT included in v1 MCP tool scope (external side effect).

get.description: **Required Scope:** `sources:read`. Same pagination/sort/search/filter pattern as Groups. Response: id, name, created_at, updated_at + meta.pagination.

post.description: **Required Scope:** `sources:write`. Body: name (Yes, max:255, unique per tenant). Errors: 422 VALIDATION_ERROR

patch.description: **Required Scope:** `sources:write`. Body: name (Yes, unique excl current). Errors: 404 NOT_FOUND, 422 VALIDATION_ERROR

delete.description: **Required Scope:** `sources:write`. Blocked if source in use by contacts (409 RESOURCE_CONFLICT with count). Errors: 404 NOT_FOUND, 409 RESOURCE_CONFLICT

get.description: **Required Scope:** `statuses:read`. Same pagination/sort/search/filter pattern. Response fields: id, name, color (hex, nullable), created_at, updated_at + meta.pagination.

post.description: **Required Scope:** `statuses:write`. Body: name (Yes, max:255, unique per tenant), color (No, max:7, hex #RRGGBB). Errors: 422 VALIDATION_ERROR

patch.description: **Required Scope:** `statuses:write`. Body: name (Yes, unique excl current), color (No, hex). Errors: 404 NOT_FOUND, 422 VALIDATION_ERROR

delete.description: **Required Scope:** `statuses:write`. Blocked if status in use by contacts (409 RESOURCE_CONFLICT with count). Errors: 404 NOT_FOUND, 409 RESOURCE_CONFLICT

get.description: **Required Scope:** `account:read`. Response: id, name, subdomain, status (default active), created_at, subscription {plan_name (default Free), plan_id, status, expires_at}. Errors: 404 NOT_FOUND

**Required Scope:** `account:read`. Per-feature usage for contacts, conversations, campaigns, staff. Each feature: current, limit (nullable, -1=unlimited), remaining, percentage_used (0-100, 2 decimals, 0 for unlimited), is_unlimited. Errors: 404 NOT_FOUND

**Required Scope:** `account:read`. data.limits: {contacts, conversations, campaigns, staff, api_calls_per_minute (from token rate_limit_per_minute, default 60)} each with limit, feature_name, is_unlimited. data.features: boolean flags {whatsapp_templates, bulk_messaging, chatbot, advanced_analytics, api_access, custom_branding}. Errors: 404 NOT_FOUND
